title: BEM-871 read decision
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:07 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM870_PROTOCOL_RESULT_FROM_BEM844.md')
txt=read(protocol)
up=txt.upper()
if 'DECISION: APPROVED' in up:
    decision='APPROVED'
    status='protocol_approved'
    next_action='finalize agreed protocol and resume implementation'
elif 'DECISION: CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up:
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
    status='protocol_change_required'
    next_action='extract required changes and repair protocol/runtime'
elif 'DECISION: BLOCKED' in up:
    decision='BLOCKED'
    status='protocol_blocked'
    next_action='repair blocker: Claude dispatcher did not provide real approval; continue runtime/action evidence repair'
else:
    decision='UNKNOWN'
    status='protocol_decision_unknown'
    next_action='repair response format and require Decision line'
state={'bem':'BEM-871','status':status,'decision':decision,'protocol_exists':protocol.exists(),'protocol_preview':txt[:2000],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem871_read_protocol_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem871_read_protocol_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-871 | Read Protocol Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem871_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-871'+sep+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem871_read_protocol_decision.json','governance/reports/bem871_read_protocol_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem871_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Read BEM-870 protocol result and classified decision as APPROVED, CHANGE_REQUIRED, BLOCKED or UNKNOWN')
"""
No issue comments.
